title: After the Tenno Sho (Spring): Even After Losing

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen emerges victorious after a
white-hot spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But while Ines Fujin makes no secret of her
frustration, Mejiro Ryan faces her fans and makes
a rousing declaration that reinvigorates both
them and herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing this, Ines senses that Mejiro Ryan is on
another level from her, and begins to seriously
consider the way she engages with her supporters.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In part to determine whether she has what it takes
to reach Ryan's level, Ines decides to throw
herself into training for the Takarazuka Kinen!
